description: Across service-a.md, service-b.md, and runbook.md: first set each service State to ready and mark its 'Update rollout note' checkbox done. Then update runbook.md under Operator Notes. A concurrent update may change the pager owner while you work; do not overwrite that concurrent pager-owner change. If a stale-write guard fails, safe-fail by leaving runbook.md with the concurrent owner change intact. If you re-read and retry, add exactly 'Validation: service-a and service-b ready.' immediately after the pager owner line.

Across frontend.md, backend.md, and handoff.md: first mark the frontend 'API contract reviewed' checkbox done. Then mark the backend 'API contract reviewed' checkbox done and update handoff.md Summary to 'Status: ready for coordinated release.' followed by 'Frontend and backend API contract reviewed.' A concurrent update may change the backend owner while you work; do not overwrite that owner change. If a stale-write guard fails, safe-fail after preserving the backend owner change. If you re-read and retry, finish the backend checkbox and set the handoff Backend contact to the new owner.
